//: Coverage scope is the query/schema/error runtime. Excludes: tooling (cli/, generate.ts, introspect.ts), edge shim (serverless.ts — tested via pg-compat contract), package barrel (index.ts), and test helpers. CLI and codegen are covered by end-to-end tests in test/cli.test.ts and test/generate-relations.test.ts; raising line coverage on them would require mocking filesystem + child_process in unit tests without adding real signal.
